item.title: 【SRE Weekly Issue #511】SRE 周刊第 #511 期
item.description: 【View on sreweekly.com A message from our sponsor, Depot: CI was designed for humans who context-switch while waiting. Agents don’t. They’re just blocked. Depot CEO Kyle Galbraith on how they re-imagined Depot CI to close the loop: run against local patches, rerun a single job, SSH into the runner to check reality. Per-second billing, no […]】在 sreweekly.com 上查看 来自我们的赞助商 Depot 的消息：CI 是为在等待时进行上下文切换的人而设计的。代理商则不然。他们只是被封锁了。 Depot 首席执行官 Kyle Galbraith 讲述了他们如何重新构想 Depot CI 来关闭循环：针对本地补丁运行，重新运行单个作业，通过 SSH 连接到运行程序以检查实际情况。按秒计费，无 [...]

item.title: 【SRE Weekly Issue #510】SRE 周刊第 #510 期
item.description: 【View on sreweekly.com A message from our sponsor, Clickhouse: AI isn’t replacing SREs. It’s changing how they work. The near future of observability isn’t autonomous agents, it’s collaboration. ClickHouse’s ClickStack Notebooks bring SREs and AI into a shared investigative workspace, combining human intuition with structured, reliable tooling to debug faster and think more clearly. Read […]】在 sreweekly.com 上查看 来自我们的赞助商 Clickhouse 的消息：人工智能不会取代 SRE。它正在改变他们的工作方式。可观察性的不久的将来不是自主代理，而是协作。 ClickHouse 的 ClickStack Notebooks 将 SRE 和 AI 引入共享的研究工作区，将人类直觉与结构化、可靠的工具相结合，以更快地调试并更清晰地思考。读 […]

item.title: 【SRE Weekly Issue #509】SRE 周刊第 509 期
item.description: 【View on sreweekly.com SRE Weekly is back! My partner is doing well, and thanks for all the kind words and well-wishes. A message from our sponsor, Costory : Tracking cloud and AI costs across AWS, GCP, and Datadog shouldn’t require three dashboards and a spreadsheet.Costory correlates cost, usage, and deployment data. Explains what changed and […]】查看 sreweekly.com SRE 周刊回来了！我的伴侣做得很好，感谢所有善意的话语和良好的祝愿。来自我们的赞助商 Costory 的消息：跟踪 AWS、GCP 和 Datadog 之间的云和 AI 成本不需要三个仪表板和一个电子表格。Costory 将成本、使用情况和部署数据关联起来。解释发生了什么变化并且[...]

item.title: 【SRE Weekly Issue #508】SRE 周刊第 #508 期
item.description: 【View on sreweekly.com SRE Weekly will be going on hiatus for 6 weeks, while I’m on leave caring for my partner after her kidney transplant surgery this week. It’s incredible that the National Kidney Registry’s Paired Exchange program allowed me to donate a kidney to help her even though we don’t have matching blood types! […]】在 sreweekly.com 上查看 SRE Weekly 将暂停 6 周，而本周我将休假照顾我的伴侣，她接受了肾移植手术。令人难以置信的是，国家肾脏登记处的配对交换计划允许我捐献肾脏来帮助她，尽管我们的血型不匹配！ […]

item.title: 【SRE Weekly Issue #507】SRE 周刊第 #507 期
item.description: 【View on sreweekly.com A message from our sponsor, incident.io: incident.io lives inside Slack and Microsoft Teams, breaking down emergencies into actionable steps to resolution. Alerts auto-create channels, ping the right people, log actions in real time, and generate postmortems with full context.Move fast when you break things and stay organized inside the tool your team already […]】在 sreweekly.com 上查看 来自我们的赞助商 event.io 的消息：incident.io 存在于 Slack 和 Microsoft Teams 中，将紧急情况分解为可行的解决步骤。警报自动创建渠道，对正确的人员进行 ping 操作，实时记录操作，并生成具有完整上下文的事后分析。当您破坏事物时快速行动，并在您的团队已经使用的工具中保持井然有序[...]
